text: Delivered zero-cost opaque subtype evidence for Symmetric, PositiveDefinite (refines Symmetric), LowerTriangular, UpperTriangular, and CanonicalSparse[COO/CSR/CSC], with explicit assume APIs and Either-returning verified alternatives. Verification is scale-aware, finite-safe, representation-preserving, and checks symmetry before Cholesky. Tests include subtype/no-allocation, analytic/adversarial, scaling, tolerance, canonicalization metamorphism, and public wildcard-import use. Final gates: core JVM 319, core JS 316, laws 29/29 both, Breeze parity 29/29, benchmark compile green.
